prompt: I am a software engineer who spent 6 years building internal tools for HVAC distributors. My brother runs a small HVAC service business and knows a lot of owners in the region. I want to make money with AI and eventually build a micro-SaaS, but I am open to starting with services. I do not have an audience. Help me figure out the best path.
assertions: Response includes a section header named Differentiation Profile
Response includes a section header named Top Opportunities
Response includes a section header named Best Bet
Response includes a section header named 7-Day Validation Plan
Response includes a section header named Build Spec
Response includes a section header named Kill Criteria
Response explicitly explains why this user can win in HVAC or why the user has an edge
Response recommends or seriously considers a hybrid ladder such as service to automation to product
Response includes a JSON block with a best_bet field
